admin.start_text:
ЁЯСЛ **Welcome to {bot_name}**

I am an advanced management system engineered to automate, secure, and moderate your Telegram communities effortlessly.

To begin, add me to your group or channel as an administrator. Use the dashboard below to explore my features and configure your chats.
admin.unpinned_all: тЬЕ All pinned messages have been unpinned.
ai.context_cleared: ЁЯз╣ Memory cleared for this chat. Mention me if you need me again!
ai.context_too_large: ЁЯУж **Context Too Large**: The conversation history is too big for this model. Try /clear_context.
ai.error_entity_too_large: ЁЯУж **Request Entity Too Large**: The prompt or image is too big.
ai.model_decommissioned: тЪая╕П **Model Decommissioned**: The selected AI model is no longer supported by the provider. Please select a new model in the **Admin Panel -> AI Assistant -> Select Model**.
ai.rate_limit: ЁЯРв **Rate Limit Reached**: Please wait {seconds} before trying again.
ai.session_closed: ЁЯТд Chat session closed and context cleared. Mention me if you need me again!

blacklist.list_header: ЁЯЪл Blacklist patterns in this group:

ЁЯЪи **CAPTCHA Verification** ЁЯЪи

Welcome {mention}! Please verify that you are human before you can speak.
captcha.not_for_you: тЭМ This button is not for you!
captcha.poll_explanation: Please select the correct answer to verify you are not a bot.
captcha.success: тЬЕ Verification successful! You can now speak.
captcha.wrong_choice: тЭМ Wrong choice! Please look closer at the image.
captcha.wrong_choice_ban: тЭМ Wrong choice! You have been banned for 24 hours.
captcha.wrong_choice_kick: тЭМ Wrong choice! You have been kicked.
captcha.wrong_choice_mute: тЭМ Wrong choice! You have been muted.
captcha.wrong_mode: This button is not for your current captcha mode.

channel_protect.antianon_on: тЬЕ Anonymous admin messages will be deleted.
channel_protect.antichannel_on: тЬЕ Channel messages will be deleted.

common.err_start_private: тЭМ Please start me in private messages first.
connection.not_admin: тЭМ You are not an admin in that group.

goodbye.updated: тЬЕ Goodbye message updated and enabled.
help.admin_text:
ЁЯСо **Admin Commands**

тАв `/promote` тАФ Give admin rights to a user
тАв `/demote` тАФ Remove admin rights
тАв `/id` тАФ Get user/chat IDs
тАв `/info` тАФ Get user information
тАв `/chatinfo` тАФ Get group details
тАв `/invitelink` тАФ Export group invite link
help.antiflood_text:
ЁЯМК **Anti-Flood**

Protect your group from mass-message spam.

тАв `/setflood <n>` тАФ Set max messages allowed
тАв `/flood` тАФ View current flood settings
help.antiraid_text:
ЁЯЪи **Anti-Raid**

Prevent botnets from joining your group.

тАв `/raid <on/off>` тАФ Toggle raid protection
тАв `/raidtime <time>` тАФ Lock group for specific duration
help.approval_text:
тЬЕ **Approval**

Approve users to bypass bot restrictions.

тАв `/approve` тАФ Approve a user
тАв `/unapprove` тАФ Remove approval
тАв `/approved` тАФ List all approved users
help.bans_text:
ЁЯЪл **Bans & Mutes**

тАв `/ban` тАФ Ban a user
тАв `/unban` тАФ Unban a user
тАв `/mute` тАФ Mute a user
тАв `/unmute` тАФ Unmute a user
тАв `/kick` тАФ Kick a user
help.blacklist_text:
ЁЯЪл **Blacklist**

Block specific words or patterns.

тАв `/addblacklist <pattern>` тАФ Add to blacklist
тАв `/rmblacklist <pattern>` тАФ Remove from blacklist
тАв `/blacklist` тАФ List active patterns
help.captcha_text:
ЁЯдЦ **CAPTCHA**

Verify new members before they can speak.

тАв `/captcha <on/off>` тАФ Toggle CAPTCHA
тАв `/captchamode <mode>` тАФ Set verification type (Image/Math/Poll)
help.cleancmd_text:
ЁЯз╣ **Clean Commands**

Automatically delete command trigger messages to keep the chat clean.

тАв `/cleancmd <on/off>` тАФ Toggle command cleaning
help.cleansvc_text:
ЁЯз╣ **Clean Service**

Delete noisy service messages (joined/left/pinned).

тАв `/cleansvc <on/off>` тАФ Toggle service cleaning
help.connections_text:
ЁЯФЧ **Connections**

Manage group settings from your PM.

тАв `/connect <chat_id>` тАФ Connect to a group
тАв `/disconnect` тАФ Terminate connection
help.disabling_text:
ЁЯФХ **Disabling**

Disable specific bot commands in your group.

тАв `/disable <command>` тАФ Disable a command
тАв `/enable <command>` тАФ Enable a command
help.federations_text:
ЁЯП░ **Federations**

Shared ban lists across multiple groups.

тАв `/newfed <name>` тАФ Create a federation
тАв `/joinfed <id>` тАФ Join a federation
тАв `/fban` тАФ Federation-ban a user
help.filters_text:
ЁЯУЛ **Filters**

Automated replies to specific keywords.

тАв `/filter <word> <reply>` тАФ Set a filter (quote multi-word triggers)
тАв `/stop <word>` тАФ Remove a filter
тАв `/stopall` тАФ Remove all filters
тАв `/filters` тАФ List active filters
help.formatting_text:
тЬи **Formatting**

Manage message styling and media IDs.

тАв `/id` тАФ Get media file IDs for use in notes/welcomes
help.greetings_text:
ЁЯСЛ **Greetings**

Welcome new members or say goodbye.

тАв `/setwelcome <text>` тАФ Set welcome message
тАв `/setgoodbye <text>` тАФ Set goodbye message
help.impexp_text:
ЁЯУе **Import/Export**

Backup and restore group settings.

тАв `/export` тАФ Get a settings backup file
тАв `/import` тАФ Restore settings from backup
help.languages_text:
ЁЯМР **Languages**

Change the bot's interface language.

тАв `/setlang <lang>` тАФ Set group language
help.locks_text:
ЁЯФТ **Locks**

Restrict message types for everyone.

тАв `/lock <type>` тАФ Lock a type (sticker, gif, etc.)
тАв `/unlock <type>` тАФ Unlock a type
help.logging_text:
ЁЯУЭ **Logging**

Send moderation logs to a private channel.

тАв `/setlog` тАФ Set the current channel for logs
тАв `/unsetlog` тАФ Disable logging
help.main_text:
ЁЯУЦ **Help & Commands Menu**

Welcome to the help center. Select a category below to explore available commands and configuration options for each module.
help.misc_text:
ЁЯО▓ **Misc**

Fun and utility commands.

тАв `/slap` тАФ Slap someone
тАв `/shrug` тАФ ┬п\_(уГД)_/┬п
тАв `/runs` тАФ Run away!
help.notes_text:
ЁЯУЭ **Notes**

Save and retrieve snippets easily.

тАв `/save <name>` тАФ Save a new note
тАв `/get <name>` or `#name` тАФ Retrieve a note
help.pin_text:
ЁЯУМ **Pin**

тАв `/pin` тАФ Pin the replied message
тАв `/permapin` тАФ Pin and notify everyone
тАв `/unpin` тАФ Unpin current message
help.privacy_text:
ЁЯФР **Privacy**

тАв `/privacy` тАФ View our privacy policy and data usage terms.
help.purges_text:
ЁЯЧСя╕П **Purges**

Mass-delete messages from the chat.

тАв `/purge` тАФ Delete from replied message to current
help.reports_text:
ЁЯУв **Reports**

Let users report spam to admins.

тАв `/report` тАФ Report a message for review
тАв `/reports <on/off>` тАФ Toggle reporting
help.rules_text:
ЁЯУЬ **Rules**

тАв `/setrules <text>` тАФ Configure group rules
тАв `/rules` тАФ View rules
help.topics_text:
ЁЯПЧя╕П **Topics**

Manage forum topics and organization.

тАв `/topic` тАФ Get current topic info
langblock.violation: ЁЯЪи {mention} was **{action}** for sending a message in a blocked language ({lang}).
language.group_picker_header:
ЁЯСе **Group Language**
Choose the default language for this group's features and messages.
language.onboarding_picker_header:
ЁЯСЛ **Welcome!**

I've detected your language from your Telegram settings. Please confirm your preferred language below to continue.
language.picker_header:
ЁЯМР **Select Language**
Choose your preferred language for this chat.
language.search_prompt: ЁЯФО Send a language name or code (e.g. `en`, `english`).
language.set: тЬЕ Language has been set to `{lang}`.
language.user_picker_header:
ЁЯСд **My Language**
Choose your personal interface language for private messages.
misc.about_text:
ЁЯМР **{bot_name} Advanced Group Manager**

A premium, high-performance Telegram moderation system built for precision and speed.

ЁЯЫбя╕П **Version**: `{version}`
ЁЯСитАНЁЯТ╗ **Developer**: {dev_name}
ЁЯУВ **Repository**: [GitHub]({repo_url})

ЁЯУЪ **Tech Stack**:
{tech_stack}

{bot_name} is designed to manage large-scale groups with zero latency and absolute reliability.
misc.run_1: runs to the other side of the room.
misc.run_3: runs to hide under the bed.
note.limit_reached: тЭМ **Limit Reached!** You can only have up to 1000 notes per group.
note.list_empty: No notes saved in this group.
note.start_private: тЭМ Please start me in private first.
panel.access_denied_repick: Access denied. Please start me in private first.
panel.admin_refresh_success: тЬЕ Admin list has been synchronized with Telegram.
panel.ai_ctx_cleared: тЬЕ AI memory for this chat has been cleared.
panel.ai_guard_action_set: тЬЕ AI Guard action set to {action}.
panel.ai_guard_enable_first: тЪая╕П Please enable the main AI Guard first!
panel.ai_guard_key_required: тЭМ **Key Required!** Please set a Groq API key before enabling the AI Guard.
panel.ai_guard_key_set: тЬЕ AI Guard API key set successfully!
panel.ai_guard_setup_guide:
ЁЯЫбя╕П **AI Guard Setup Guide**
тФБтФБтФБтФБтФБтФБтФБтФБтФБтФБтФБтФБтФБтФБ
To activate {bot_name}'s advanced AI protection, follow these steps:

1я╕ПтГг Visit [Groq Console](https://console.groq.com) and generate an API key.
2я╕ПтГг Click the **ЁЯФС Set API Key** button and paste your key.
3я╕ПтГг Choose your preferred **Action** (Delete, Warn, Mute, or Ban).
4я╕ПтГг Toggle **ЁЯЫбя╕П Text Guard** or **Media Guard** to **ON** to start protecting.

тЬи The system will use a powerful {model} model to keep your group clean.
panel.ai_invalid_api:
тЭМ **API Validation Failed!**
Please check your API key and Model ID for {provider}.
panel.ai_select_model_text:
ЁЯУж **Select AI Model**
Choose an optimized model for **{provider}** or enter a custom ID.
panel.blacklist_blocks_text:
ЁЯУж **Default Bad Word Blocks**
Choose a severity level to inject into your chat's blacklist. This will help you quickly set up protection against common offensive words.
panel.blacklist_inject_error: тЭМ Partial injection: {success} added, {failed} failed (likely already existing or limit reached).
panel.blacklist_inject_success: тЬЕ Successfully injected {count} words from the {level} block into your blacklist.
panel.blacklist_invalid_regex: тЭМ **Invalid Regex!** Please check your syntax.
panel.blacklist_limit_reached: тЭМ **Limit Reached!** You can only have up to 200 blacklist patterns per group.
panel.blacklist_text:
ЁЯЪл **Blacklist Settings**
Manage blocked patterns. Supports literal, wildcard (`*`), and regex (`re:`) matching.
panel.btn_add_to_channel: тЮХ Add to a New Channel
panel.btn_add_to_group: тЮХ Add to a New Group

Configure how this filter should behave using the toggles below:

ЁЯУЛ **Auto-Reply Filters**
Create smart keyword-based responses for FAQs, rules, and quick replies.

ЁЯТб Tip: You can also add filters in-chat using `/filter keyword`.
panel.general_text:
тЪЩя╕П **General Settings**
Customize the group's daily behavior and interface options.

ЁЯМР Language
ЁЯСЛ Welcome/Goodbye
ЁЯз╣ Service cleanup
panel.greetings_text:
ЁЯСЛ **Greetings & Filters**
Manage welcome messages, rules, and keyword filters to engage your members.
panel.groups_list_title:
ЁЯСе **Your Groups**
Select a group to configure its moderation and automation settings.
panel.input_invalid_string: тЪая╕П Please enter a valid text.
panel.input_invalid_time: тЭМ Invalid time format! Please use HH:MM (e.g. 14:30).
panel.input_prompt_aiApiKey:
тМия╕П **Set AI API Key**
Please enter your API key for {provider}.

**Note:** This will be stored securely and masked in the UI.
panel.input_prompt_aiInstruction:
тМия╕П **Set AI Custom Instruction**
Enter persistent behavioral instructions for the AI (e.g., 'Always be concise', 'Respond as a helpful assistant').
panel.input_prompt_aiModelId:
тМия╕П **Set AI Model ID**
Enter the model name you want to use (e.g. `gpt-4o`, `gemini-1.5-flash`, `claude-3-5-sonnet-20240620`).
panel.input_prompt_aiSystemPrompt:
тМия╕П **Set AI System Prompt**
Enter the assistant's personality and instructions. This defines how the bot behaves.
panel.input_prompt_blacklistInput:
тМия╕П **Add Blacklist Pattern**
Enter the word or pattern to block.

**Auto-Detection Examples**:
тАв `badword` тАФ Literal
тАв `*badword*` тАФ Wildcard
тАв `^cat.*$` тАФ Regex

*Limit: 200 entries per group.*
panel.input_prompt_buttonsText:
тМия╕П **Add New Button**
Enter the label and URL separated by a pipe (`|`).

Example: `Visit Site | https://google.com`
panel.input_prompt_captchaTimeout:
тМия╕П **Captcha Timeout**
Enter the time in seconds a user has to solve the captcha before kick:
panel.input_prompt_cleanerInactive:
тМия╕П **Inactive Days Threshold**
Enter the number of days a user must be offline to be considered inactive (e.g. `30`).

*Set to 0 to disable.*
panel.input_prompt_cleanerRunTime:
тМия╕П **Cleaner Run Time**
Enter the time in HH:MM format for the group cleaner to run daily (e.g. `04:00`).

*Note: This can only be changed once per day.*
panel.input_prompt_entityblockInput:
тМия╕П **Add Blocked Entity**
Enter the entity type you want to block:

`url`, `mention`, `hashtag`, `cashtag`, `email`, `phone`, `spoiler`, `poll`, `contact`, `location`
panel.input_prompt_filterKeyword:
тМия╕П **New Filter Keyword**
Enter the keyword or phrase that should trigger the bot's response.
panel.input_prompt_filterResponse:
тМия╕П **New Filter Response** (`{keyword}`)

Now send the message you want the bot to respond with. Supported types:

ЁЯУЭ **Formatted Text**
ЁЯЦ╝я╕П **Media (Photos, Videos, GIFs)**
ЁЯОн **Stickers & Animations**
ЁЯУК **Polls & Locations**

You can include captions with media.
panel.input_prompt_floodThreshold:
тМия╕П **Flood Threshold**
Enter the new flood message limit (number):
panel.input_prompt_floodWindow:
тМия╕П **Flood Window**
Enter the new flood time window in seconds (number):
panel.input_prompt_groqKey:
**тМия╕П Set Groq API Key**
Please enter your API key from [Groq Console](https://console.groq.com).

*Note: This is used strictly for AI spam detection.*
panel.input_prompt_gsbKey:
тМия╕П **Set GSB API Key**

To get your key:
1. Go to the [Google Cloud Console](https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/library/safebrowsing.googleapis.com).
2. Enable the **Safe Browsing API**.
3. Go to **Credentials** and create an **API Key**.

Paste your key below:
panel.input_prompt_langblockInput:
тМия╕П **Add Blocked Language**
Enter the language name or ISO code (e.g. `Russian`, `he`, `Arabic`):
panel.input_prompt_nightlockEnd:
тМия╕П **Night Lock End Time**
Enter the time to disable the lock (e.g. `08:00`):
panel.input_prompt_nightlockStart:
тМия╕П **Night Lock Start Time**
Enter the time to enable the lock (e.g. `22:00`):
panel.input_prompt_purgeMessagesCount:
ЁЯЧСя╕П **Purge Messages**
Enter the number of messages to delete (1-100):
panel.input_prompt_raidActionTime:
тМия╕П **Punish Duration**
Enter the temporary ban time for users joining during a raid (e.g. `1h`, `15m`):
panel.input_prompt_raidThreshold:
тМия╕П **Raid Threshold**
Enter the amount of joins required to trigger raid mode:
panel.input_prompt_raidTime:
тМия╕П **Raid Duration**
Enter the time for the raid mode to last (e.g. `3h`, `30m`):
panel.input_prompt_raidWindow:
тМия╕П **Raid Window**
Enter the time window in seconds to track joins:
panel.input_prompt_reactions:
тМия╕П **Set Automated Reactions**
Enter a list of emojis separated by spaces (e.g. ЁЯСН тЭдя╕П ЁЯФе).
panel.input_prompt_reminderText:
тМия╕П **New Reminder Message**

Send any message you'd like to schedule as a daily reminder. Supported types:

ЁЯУЭ **Formatted Text**
ЁЯЦ╝я╕П **Media (Photos, Videos, GIFs)**
ЁЯУК **Interactive Polls**
ЁЯУН **Locations & Venues**
ЁЯУД **Documents & Audio**

Simply send your message now to proceed.
panel.input_prompt_reminderTime:
тМия╕П **Reminder Time**
Enter the time in HH:MM format for this reminder to be sent daily (e.g. '14:30'):
panel.input_prompt_rulesText:
тМия╕П **Rule Text**
Enter the new rules for this group. You can use standard formatting.
panel.input_prompt_signatureText:
тМия╕П **Set Channel Signature**
Enter the text to append to all messages in this channel. Keep it short to avoid hitting Telegram's limits (Max 4096 text, 1024 captions).
panel.input_prompt_slowmode:
тМия╕П **Slowmode Interval**
Enter the slowmode interval in seconds (0 to disable):
panel.input_prompt_stickerInput:
ЁЯОн **Block Sticker Set**
Send a sticker or a link to the set you want to block, and its entire set will be added to the protection list.
panel.input_prompt_warnLimit:
тМия╕П **Warn Limit**
Enter how many warnings until action is taken (number):
panel.error_file_too_large: тЭМ File is too large! Maximum size for a logo is {size}MB.
panel.input_prompt_watermarkImage:
ЁЯЦ╝я╕П **Upload Watermark Image**
Please send the image you want to use as a watermark (as a photo or file).
panel.input_prompt_watermarkOpacity:
ЁЯМУ **Set Watermark Opacity**
Enter a value between 5 and 100 (e.g. `70` for 70% opacity).
panel.input_prompt_watermarkSize:
ЁЯУП **Set Watermark Size**
Enter the size percentage relative to the image width (e.g. `10` for 10% size).
panel.input_prompt_watermarkText:
тМия╕П **Set Watermark Text**
Enter the text to apply as a watermark to images in this channel (e.g. '@MyChannel').
panel.input_prompt_welcomeText:
тМия╕П **Welcome Text**
Enter the new welcome message. You can use standard formatting and `{first_name}`, `{last_name}`, `{username}`, `{chat_name}`, `{mention}` placeholders.
panel.langblock_action_set: тЬЕ Language block penalty set to {action}.
panel.langblock_picker_text:
ЁЯЧгя╕П **Select Languages to Block**
Choose the languages you want to restrict in this group.
panel.langblock_text:
ЁЯЧгя╕П **Language Block Settings**
Restrict users from sending messages in specific languages.
panel.locks_text:
ЁЯФТ **Lock Settings**
Toggle which message types are allowed.
panel.logging_picker_text:
ЁЯУг **Log Channel Selection**

Click the button below to select a channel for bot logging. You must be an administrator in the selected channel, and the bot must be a member.
panel.main_text:
ЁЯЫбя╕П **Admin Panel: {title}**
Welcome! Pick a section below to configure security, moderation, automation, and more.
panel.main_text_channel:
ЁЯУ║ **Channel: {title}**
Welcome to the moderation suite. Choose a category below to proceed.
panel.main_text_user:
ЁЯСд **Global Preferences**
Customize your personal bot interface and language settings.
panel.moderation_text:
тЪЦя╕П **Moderation & Enforcement**
Configure how violations are handled, manage warnings, and control the flow of the chat with automated tools.

тЪая╕П **Warns**: Set thresholds and penalties
ЁЯРМ **Slowmode**: Prevent message flooding
ЁЯУЭ **Logs**: Audit all admin actions
panel.my_chats_title:
ЁЯПа **Admin Dashboard**
Select the type of chat you wish to manage.
panel.no_groups: тЭМ You are not an admin in any groups where I am present.
panel.pick_chat:
ЁЯПЩя╕П **Select a Chat**
Please select a chat to begin configuring its settings.
panel.pick_group:
ЁЯПЩя╕П **Select a Group**
Please select a group to begin configuring its settings.
panel.promotion_notify:
ЁЯОК **Congratulations!** You are now an administrator of **{title}**.

You can use the dashboard below to manage settings for this chat directly from here:
panel.redirect_pm_text:
тЪЩя╕П **Admin Panel**
Click the button below to manage this group's settings securely in your private chat.
panel.reminder_text:
тП░ **Daily Reminders**
Schedule recurring posts for rules, notices, and routine updates.

ЁЯУМ Up to 3 reminder slots per chat.
panel.rules_text:
ЁЯУЬ **Rules Manager**
Control your rules message and whether users receive it in chat or private message.
panel.scheduler_text:
ЁЯУЕ **Automation & Scheduling**
Set up time-based tools that work automatically. Manage recurring reminders, nighttime restrictions, and align the bot with your local time.

тП░ **Reminders**: Send scheduled messages
ЁЯМЩ **Night Lock**: Auto-mute during late hours
ЁЯМН **Timezone**: Sync tasks with your local clock
panel.scheduler_text_channel:
ЁЯУЕ **Scheduler & Automation**
Manage time-based features like recurring reminders and local timezone settings.
panel.security_text:
ЁЯЫбя╕П **Security & Protection**
Defend your community against automated attacks and spam waves. Configure multi-layered defenses to keep the chat safe.

ЁЯМК **Flood**: Stop rapid message bursts
ЁЯЪи **AntiRaid**: Block bot invasion waves
ЁЯдЦ **Captcha**: Verify new members
panel.security_text_channel:
ЁЯЫбя╕П **Security Settings**
Manage URL scanning and advanced security features.
panel.service_cleaner_text:
ЁЯз╣ **Service Message Cleaner**
Keep your chat feed clean by auto-removing Telegram service events.

тЬЕ Use the master toggle to clean all service messages
тЪЩя╕П Or choose only specific types
panel.service_cleaner_types_text:
тЪЩя╕П **Manage Service Types (Page {page}/{total})**
Toggle the specific service message events you want to automatically clean from the chat.
panel.setting_not_allowed_for_type: тЭМ This setting is not available for this type of chat.
panel.settings_text:
тЪЩя╕П **Core Configuration**
Manage the fundamental behavior of the bot in this group. Adjust language settings and coordinate administrative permissions.

ЁЯМР **Language**: Set local interface
ЁЯУг **Logs**: Set audit channel
ЁЯСо **Admins**: Sync permissions
panel.shabbat_text:
ЁЯХпя╕П **Shabbat & Holiday Observance**
Automatically restrict chat activity during Shabbat and Jewish holidays to honor the sanctity of the day. The bot will manage lock and unlock times based on your local timezone.

**Status**: {status}
**Timezone**: `{timezone}`
panel.slowmode_text:
ЁЯРМ **Slowmode Control**
Limit how frequently members can send messages to reduce spam bursts.

Current Interval: {interval}s (0 = Off)
panel.stickers_text:
ЁЯОн **Sticker Set Blocking**
Block entire sticker sets by their name. Send a sticker from a set to block it, or use the list to manage blocked sets.
panel.switch_chat: тЬЕ Switched to management for this chat.
panel.timezone_picker_text:
ЁЯМН **Timezone Selection**

To ensure all scheduled tasks run at the correct time, please select your group's region and city.
panel.timezone_region_text:
ЁЯЧ║я╕П **Region: {region}**

Select a city from the list below:
panel.timezone_search_prompt:
ЁЯФН **Search Timezone**

Please type the name of a city or country (e.g. `Jerusalem` or `London`).
panel.timezone_search_results_text:
ЁЯФН **Search Results for: {query}**

Select the correct timezone from the results:
panel.timezone_set_success: тЬЕ **Success!** Timezone has been set to `{tz}`.
panel.timezone_text:
ЁЯУЕ **Timezone Settings**
Set your group's local timezone so reminders and automations trigger at the right time.

Current Timezone: `{timezone}`
panel.urlscanner_key_required: тЭМ **Key Required!** Please set a Google Safe Browsing API key before enabling the scanner.
panel.urlscanner_text:
ЁЯФН **URL Scanner Settings**
Protect your group from phishing and malicious links using Google Safe Browsing.

**Status**: {status}
**API Key**: `{key}`

**Make sure to provide a valid API key to use this feature.**
panel.user_warns_reset_success: тЬЕ User warnings have been reset.
panel.user_warns_text:
ЁЯСе **Users With Active Warns**
Review members who currently have warning records in this chat.
panel.welcome_text:
ЁЯСЛ **Welcome & Goodbye**
Configure greeting messages and onboarding flow for new members.
panel.wm_video_limit_note: тД╣я╕П Max video size for watermark: {size_mb} MB
panel.wm_video_unavailable: Video watermark is disabled by the developer on this server.
privacy.main:
ЁЯФР **Privacy Policy**

We respect your privacy. This bot does not collect any data that is not strictly necessary for its functionality (such as group settings and basic moderation logs).

The source code is fully transparent and available on GitHub. You can view more details, including the repository link, by using the /about command.
purge.confirm: тЭУ This will delete all messages since that point. Proceed?
purge.usage: Reply to a message from where you want to start purging.
